sections.paragraph:
Original: מפעת מיפעת מופעת o

Transliteration: môpha‛ath mêypha‛ath mêpha‛ath

Phonetic: mo-fah'-ath

BDB Definition:

Mephaath = "splendour" or " height"
  1. a city of Reuben allotted to the Merarite Levites lying in the district of the Mishor; site uncertain
  2. a city in Moab

Origin: from H3313

TWOT entry: None

Part(s) of speech: Proper Name Location
